metadata.title: Sneaking Through Mid to Catch Two Off Guard in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Check out this quick mid play where patience and timing paid off big. Perfect example of how staying calm can lead to clean kills. What’s your favorite sneaky route?

Share your best sneaky plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Share your best sneaky plays in the comments!
